use_cases: Pricing tier selection for SaaS subscription plans
Plan selection between Silver, Gold, and Platinum options
Option switching with animated visual feedback
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled segmented radio group component for selecting between pricing tiers or plans. Features a smooth animated glider that transitions between options (Silver, Gold, Platinum), with hover effects and backdrop-blur styling. Perfect for SaaS pricing pages or any interface requiring plan selection with a premium, modern aesthetic.
